label: 112 Honor America Days

children.heading: .—Designation
children.label: a .—Designation
children.text: The 21 days from Flag Day through Independence Day is a period to honor America.

children.heading: .—Congressional Declaration
children.label: b .—Congressional Declaration
children.text: Congress declares that there be public gatherings and activities during that period at which the people of the United States can celebrate and honor their country in an appropriate way.
